system_prompt:
You are an assistant that makes FINAL DECISIONS about which items from a Toronto travel itinerary are truly relevant to a user's request.

In Stage 1, candidate items were identified from the manifest. Now you have access to the FULL DETAILS of those candidate items.

Your job is to:
1. Review the detailed information for each candidate
2. FILTER OUT items that don't actually match the user's intent
3. CONFIRM which items are truly relevant

Be PRECISE at this stage - only include items that genuinely match the user's request.

Return your response as valid JSON with this structure:
{
    "matched_ids": ["poi_001", "rest_002"],
    "stage2_reasoning": "Explanation of why these specific items were confirmed as relevant after reviewing their details",
    "filtered_out": {
        "poi_003": "Reason why this candidate was rejected"
    },
    "confidence": "high/medium/low"
}

Only return the JSON, no other text.
user_prompt:
User Request: Find all lunch places that happens before 2 PM

=== ITINERARY MANIFEST (for context) ===
[Day 1] [8:30 AM - 10:00 AM] St. Lawrence Market ⟨poi_001⟩ (poi)
[Day 1] [10:30 AM - 12:00 PM] CN Tower ⟨poi_002⟩ (poi)
[Day 1] [12:30 PM - 2:00 PM] Queen Street West ⟨poi_003⟩ (poi)
[Day 1] [2:30 PM - 3:00 PM] Picnic Lunch from Sud Forno at Trinity Bellwoods Park ⟨rest_001⟩ (restaurant)
[Day 1] [3:30 PM - 5:30 PM] Art Gallery of Ontario ⟨poi_004⟩ (poi)
[Day 1] [6:00 PM - 8:00 PM] Dinner at The Rex Jazz & Blues Bar ⟨rest_002⟩ (restaurant)
[Day 2] [9:30 AM - 10:30 AM] Kensington Market ⟨poi_005⟩ (poi)
[Day 2] [11:00 AM - 1:00 PM] Royal Ontario Museum ⟨poi_006⟩ (poi)
[Day 2] [3:00 PM - 4:30 PM] Toronto Music Garden ⟨poi_007⟩ (poi)
[Day 2] [5:00 PM - 6:30 PM] Distillery District ⟨poi_008⟩ (poi)
[Day 2] [1:20 PM - 2:30 PM] Lunch at Museum Tavern ⟨rest_003⟩ (restaurant)
[Day 2] [7:00 PM - 9:00 PM] Dinner at The Reservoir Lounge ⟨rest_004⟩ (restaurant)
[Day 3] [9:10 AM - 10:00 AM] Hula Girl Espresso ⟨rest_005⟩ (restaurant)
[Day 3] [10:30 AM - 2:00 PM] Toronto Islands ⟨poi_009⟩ (poi)
[Day 3] [12:30 PM - 2:00 PM] Lunch at Toronto Island BBQ & Beer Co. ⟨rest_006⟩ (restaurant)
[Day 3] [3:00 PM - 5:00 PM] Ripley's Aquarium of Canada ⟨poi_010⟩ (poi)
[Day 3] [5:30 PM - 6:30 PM] Vinyl Underground ⟨poi_011⟩ (poi)
[Day 3] [7:00 PM - 10:00 PM] Dinner at Lula Lounge ⟨rest_007⟩ (restaurant)


=== CANDIDATE ENTITIES FROM STAGE 1 ===
The following items were identified as potentially relevant:
[
  "rest_003",
  "rest_006"
]

Stage 1 reasoning: Both 'Lunch at Museum Tavern ⟨rest_003⟩' and 'Lunch at Toronto Island BBQ & Beer Co. ⟨rest_006⟩' are scheduled before 2 PM, making them potential candidates for lunch places prior to 2 PM.

=== DETAILED INFORMATION FOR CANDIDATES ===
{
  "rest_003": {
    "id": "rest_003",
    "poi_name": "Lunch at Museum Tavern",
    "day": "day2",
    "time_block": "1:20 PM - 2:30 PM",
    "description": "Grab a stylish brasserie-style lunch directly across from the Royal Ontario Museum, offering elevated comfort dishes and a great view of Bloor Street.",
    "travel_method": "Walking",
    "expected_cost": "CAD 25-40",
    "notable_highlights": "Classic burgers and brasserie plates, patio seating with ROM views, excellent cocktails"
  },
  "rest_006": {
    "id": "rest_006",
    "poi_name": "Lunch at Toronto Island BBQ & Beer Co.",
    "day": "day3",
    "time_block": "12:30 PM - 2:00 PM",
    "description": "Enjoy a relaxed lakeside lunch right on Toronto Island with fresh BBQ plates and unbeatable skyline views.",
    "travel_method": "Walking",
    "expected_cost": "CAD 20-30",
    "notable_highlights": "Outdoor waterfront dining, Toronto skyline views, casual island atmosphere"
  }
}

Based on the detailed information above, which items are TRULY relevant to the user's request?
Filter out any items that don't actually match after seeing their full details.

parsed_result.stage2_reasoning: Upon reviewing the detailed information, 'Lunch at Toronto Island BBQ & Beer Co. ⟨rest_006⟩' fits the user's request as it ends at 2:00 PM, providing a full lunch experience before 2 PM. Conversely, 'Lunch at Museum Tavern ⟨rest_003⟩' lasts until 2:30 PM, overlapping the user's 2 PM cutoff and is thus not suitable.

filtered_out.rest_003: The lunch at Museum Tavern begins before 2 PM but ends at 2:30 PM, which does not strictly match the user's requirement of being completed before 2 PM.
